action.legal_or_rti_action: For a persistent unresolved issue, ask the department for written status, responsible office, and related work/order records for Bellanduru. Use RTI only for official records; do not include private account details outside official workflows.
action.message_draft: Hello, I want to report a sewage/water issue at Bellanduru. Ward/corporation: 45 Bellanduru / East. I can share photos, pin/landmark, date/time, and recurrence details. I did not find matching public work/payment rows for this exact issue yet. I will share account or private details only inside the official form, not in public messages. Please route this to Bengaluru Water Supply and Sewerage Board and share the official complaint/reference number.
action.primary_action: File a BWSSB complaint for Bellanduru; include a photo/video if safe and use account details only inside the official form.
